feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Master Data Governance
feed.subtitle: SAP Master Data Governance Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: How to hide some "screen" on MDG
entry.content:
Hello team, 

In the context of GDPR, I would like to hide the BANK ACCOUNT section based on a role assigned to the user.

To access MDG, I go through the Fiori launchpad.

Do you know if it is possible to hide certain screens based on roles in MDG? If so, how can it be done?

Thanks


PI : 
BS_BP_BANK_ACCOUNT id of UIBB of BANK ACCOUNT in web dynpro BS_SP_OVP

entry.title: Default Values in the Search Input of Cost Center Hierarchy in MDG
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I have requirement to default the value of the Edition, controlling area and Cost center hierarchy in the attached screenshot. I tried to check the feed class but the feeder class is not available in the technical help. Any suggestion or hits are highly appreciated.

Thanks!!

entry.title: Adding cost center Hierarchy field in the cost center search screen in SAP MDG
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I have requirement to add the Hierarchy assignment field in the cost center display screen. When we search for any cost center we need to add the Hierarchy assignment field to be displayed along with the other cost center fields.  Any suggestion or hits, how can we achieve this are highly appreciated.

 

Thanks!!

entry.title: Vendor Creation Approval Workflow
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I’m currently working on setting up a workflow in SAP S/4HANA for Vendor Creation using BP T-Code, where a manager's approval is required before the vendor is created. I want to ensure that the process runs smoothly and efficiently.

If you have experience with SAP workflows, approval processes, or best practices in workflow automation, I would love to hear your insights! Any guidance, documentation, or suggestions would be greatly appreciated.

Your help would be incredibly valuable, and I’d be happy to exchange ideas on SAP-related topics as well. Looking forward to learning from this amazing community!

entry.title: DRF IDOC Errors
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,
Hope all are doing good.
I'm currently working on implementing Data Replication Framework (DRF) in SAP Master Data Governance (MDG) for material data replication between two systems:

Sender: SAP S/4HANA MDG 1909
Receiver: SAP S/4HANA MDG 2020

I've completed the following IDoc configuration

Sender System (1909)
1. Configured Logical System (SALE)
2. Assigned Logical System (SALE)
3. Set up RFC Destination (SM59)
4. Configured Port (WE21)
5. Created Distribution Model (BD64)
6. Generated Partner Profile
7. Distribute the Model View

Receiver System (2020)
1. Configured Logical System (SALE)
2. Assigned Logical System (SALE)
3. In Distribution Model Create Partner Profile (BD64)


After completing these configurations, I tested the setup using transaction code 'BD10' For Material the IDoc status in the sender system shows success. However, although data is being received in the receiver system, it's not being created.

I've attached the error details for your reference. Could you please help me troubleshoot this issue?

Thank you in advance for your assistance.

entry.title: Which block to consider for customer Central block, deletion flag, or Sales or cocd level block?
entry.content: I am doing a de-duplication project for a client. The client wants to block the duplicates in a certain way that the duplicate customers cant be edited, nor can it be used in a sales order or any relevant docs. What block do I set in this case?

entry.title: Re: Hide or Show Process template based on roles for Cons...
entry.content:
Introduction: 

When we are trying to create/change BP or material from consolidation and mass processing from MDG using 'Import data for consolidation' and 'manage mass processes', we get a drop down with process templates listed. This list contains all the standard and custom process templates in the system particular to a data model. We will try to restrict the unwanted process templates from showing in the drop down using roles.

Solution:

Step 1: Create roles for supplier, customer and material.

Go to t-code 'pfcg' and create roles.

Assign user ids to the role and save.

Step 2: Create a BRF decision table which will hold the roles and the process templates that to be accessed by those roles. 

 Step 3: Write code for restriction of templates.

Class name: CL_MDC_PROCESS_DPC_EXT

Method name: DATAPROCESSTEMPL_GET_ENTITYSET

Create an enhancement or a post exit and write code using following logic.

***Fetch role for user id using table agr_users and sy-uname.

***Fetch data from BRF decision table.

***In et_entityset you will find all the process templates related to the data model and process. Use role and decision table to restrict other process templates.

Note: The same class and method will be triggered for both the data models(BP and MM) for mass create and mass change scenarios.

I hope you find this helpful! 🙂

entry.title: Current Retail customer is implementing S/4 but has a 3rd party CRM tool-how do we keep data clean?
Table type for BUS_EI_EXTERN structure in sap mdg
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I have a general doubt and just need a guidance on the same.

We want to send some table type data from ECC to CRM box via BDOC for MDG BP.

I want to push the table type related to BP.

Can i just do the table type for BUS_EI_EXTERN structure in ECC via append and consume the same in CRM bdoc FM's.

Thanks.

Regards,

Karthik S

entry.title: Lock WBS Element programmatically using BAPI or Function Module
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

My requirement is to lock WBS element programmatically using BAPi or Function Module. I have found one BAPI 'BAPI_BUS2054_CHANGE_MULTI' to update the WBS element, but didn't found any field to lock the WBS element under project definition and project profile level. 

If anyone has worked on this kind of a requirement / any suggestions would be helpful.

Thanks.

--

Regards,

Mayuresh

entry.title: MDG Custom hierarchy replication in set tables
entry.content:
Scenario

We have many custom hierarchies maintained in MDG for custom codeblocks . Some of the object can have alternate hierarchy. In alternate hierarchy, parent-child relationship can be different than the standard one. Some of these hierarchies are replicated to S4 and other just reside in MDG staging and supplied to BW infoobjects using data source.

Solution:

From MDG perspective, I think things are pretty standard and above requirement can be taken care off. We have concerns in replicating custom hierarchy in Set tables.

We have replicated custom object hierarchy to S4 tables (SET* tables). We use setclass ‘0000’ for custom set provided by SAP. Here we have encountered following issue.

  •  If there is common node numbering between two different hierarchy, then replication does not work correctly. For eg: Lets say hierarchy 1 has node 1000 in the hierarchy and  hierarchy 2 has node 1000 in the hierarchy, this situation as per my understanding does not go well with SET* tables because setclass ‘0000’ (which is primary key) and create issue in replication.

To avoid the situation, we have currently told business to have separate numbering (manually) for both set of hierarchy and nodes.  In case of alternate hierarchy, we do face similar issue during replication. Currently, we are using different setclass for alternate hierarchy.

Question to expert:

1. How can we overcome above issue? Is there any standard procedure where SAP recommends how to replicate custom object hierarchy in Set tables?

2. How to use custom(Z) set class to replicate hierarchy in set tables?

3. How can we make custom(Z) set class avaiable in HRRP report relvant so that hierarchy is transferred from Set tables to HRRP tables?

Lokking for your expert opininons.

Thanks and regards.

entry.title: SAP MDG: "No Valid Target Content Area Found" Error Due to Dual Fiori Roles in Change Request Inbox
entry.content:
A particular user has Requestor as well as Approver Fiori roles. When the user tries to open the change request from application 'Change Request Inbox', the user gets error of No Valid Target content area found. But on the other side, it works fine if the user has only one Fiori role i.e. either Requestor Fiori Role or Approver Fiori Role.

Thanks & Regards, 
Sandeep Suggu.
(SAP MDG Consultant)

entry.title: MDG-F Change "Line Item Display" in GL ACCOUNT Table
entry.content:
Hello MDG Experts.

There are two processes to do some mass changes in MDG.

1 - File Upload app

2 - Mass Change app

I need to change the field "LINE ITEM DISPLAY" in GL ACCOUNT Table ( this is a staging table ) 

The technical field is  USMDZ1_XKRES and the type is XFELD.

The problem is, The apps is not making any changes. I received the message saying "ok". I approve all Change Request created for it, but is not reflecting the change.

For other fields with the same type working correctly. The problem is only for "Line Item Display".

Do you guys know if there are any configuration in SPRO for example to configure it or how to fix it ?

Thank you!

entry.title: Mass Data Changes for Master Data (General Ledger Accounts, etc.) Using SAP Fiori Apps
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

In the past, I used LSMW on R3 to change master data of G/L accounts or other FI objects en masse. As far as I know, there is the SAP Migration Cockpit as a successor to LSMW, but it can only be used to migrate new master data records for G/L accounts, for example.
I am looking for a Fiori app to change masses of existing master data of, for example, G/L accounts or other FI objects.
Can anyone help?
Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Screen customers/vendors using CSI watchdog platform API in Create & Change process of MDG
entry.content:
Hello MDG Experts,

Need pointers if anyone had similar requirement to enable screen customers/vendors using CSI watchdog platform API in change request of Create & Change process of MDG

entry.title: MDG Consolidation chart/graph not updated in Initial Check step
entry.content:
We have recently configured the MDG consolidation in the system and when we are testing it out with sample data, we see in the Fiori the data but the chart/graph area says "No displayable results" in the Intial Check step. Although when we click on Show result we see the data.

Are we missing something?

@SAPSupport 

Thanks in advance

entry.title: Personalization in sap mdg ui customer
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I just want to know how to create the personalization in sap mdg ui for customer screen.

On top of it, I would like to know how to bring the below settings so that the list of blocks are visible for the individual user.

Thanks in advance.

 

 

Regards,

Karthik S

entry.title: SAP MDG: I can't create a validation rule after deleting the existing one
entry.content:
Hi all,

could you help me please with this case:

I had a validation rules in SAP MDG for BP, but for some reason I deleted the existing CHECK_AD_POSTAL (function), because all afterwards created rules  did not work. So I deleted it and marked it for deletion with the hope that I can create a new one and begin my journey about Creating Validation Rules from the beginning.

Now my problem is, if I try to create a function with the name: CHECK_AD_POSTAL I get an error message that: Name CHECK_AD_POSTAL has already been used.

Could you tell me please what shold I do so that I can create again a function for the entity AD_POSTAL?

Thank you in advance for your help! 

BR
Umar

entry.title: Maintenance of KNB1 - PERNR via MDC not possible anymore?
entry.content:
Dear all,

my I ask if the field KNB1-PERNR is in scope for MDC in MDG on-prem? It was maintained in a scope before and was deleted. Trying to re-insert it into the scope, but it is not selectable. I did try to find official information regarding this field, but was not able to find any.

Thank you in advance for any help, hint and official document.

Best regards
Mauri

entry.title: SAP Master Data Governance (Supplier or Customer) - Creation of Contact Persons
entry.content:
Good Day, valued SAP Experts,

we have a requirement to create contact persons in a dedicated Business Partner Gruping (Z****). We are Using MDG on SAP S/4 HANA. Creation of Contact Persons together with the Main Business Partner (Customer or Supplier) works fine, however Contact Persons are always created in the same BP-Grouping as the main Business Partner.

 

Scenario Despription

While creating our Main Business Partner, MDG allows to simultaneously create a contact person (similar to the Fiori App Manage BP). This works fine. If we are now creating a new Customer or Cuspplier (or both) in the Business Partner Grouping (Z1**), we can simultaneounsly a contact person. That works fine. But the Contact person is also created with the same Busness Partner Grouping (Z1**).

The requirement, however, is that all contact persons are created in one single Business Partner Grouping (ZX**), so independant of the Grouping of the Main Business Partner.

We can not find any customizing to support this requirement. Did anyone have the same requirement in the past and how did you solve it (ideally of course in or close to SAP standard).

Any Feedback is well appriceiated.

Best Regards

 


Acram
